mapper.sql: checklist_item_id AS checklistItemId, trip_id AS tripId, assignee_user_id AS assigneeUserId, title, is_done AS done, due_at AS dueAt, created_at AS createdAt, completed_at AS completedAt
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TRIP t LEFT JOIN TRIP_MEMBER tm ON tm.trip_id = t.trip_id AND tm.user_id = #{userId} AND tm.invite_status = 'ACCEPTED' AND tm.member_role = 'EDITOR' WHERE t.trip_id = #{tripId} AND (t.owner_user_id = #{userId} OR tm.trip_member_id IS NOT NULL) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHECKLIST_ITEM ( trip_id, assignee_user_id, title, is_done, due_at ) VALUES ( #{item.tripId}, #{item.assigneeUserId}, #{item.title}, #{item.done}, #{item.dueAt} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM CHECKLIST_ITEM WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY is_done ASC, due_at IS NULL ASC, due_at ASC, checklist_item_id ASC
